extra.reason:
Implemented scaffold in commit 80bc1eb.

Ran:
- node build.mjs
- node --test

Observed:
- node build.mjs exited 0 and regenerated dist/orchestration.html with version stamp 0.1.0; output contains no unresolved {{PLACEHOLDER}} tokens.
- node --test exited 0 and reported:
  ? build emits a fully resolved orchestration bundle (36.1485ms)
  ? tests 1
  ? pass 1
  ? fail 0
  ? duration_ms 86.2292

Suggested verifier checks:
- Open dist/orchestration.html and confirm the HTML shell includes #hud-header, #toolbar, #waves, #legend, and #foot.
- Inspect fixtures/issues.sample.jsonl for realistic bd 1.1.0 issue/export coverage: epics, dot-children, statuses, labels, dependencies, and verification ledger comments.
- Re-run node build.mjs && node --test from a clean checkout and confirm both exit 0.

Follow-up work worth separate beads:
- .gitignore now only contains node_modules/ and *.log per bead scope; if the team still wants local Dolt artifacts ignored in git, that should be an explicit follow-up decision instead of being restored silently.
Completed the Stark-HUD visual design, added theme contract tests, verified output in browser and verified build tests.

Implemented data engine in commit 0ed33ed.

Ran:
- node --test
- node build.mjs

Observed:
- node --test exited 0 and reported 9 tests, 9 pass, 0 fail, duration_ms 92.0876.
- node build.mjs exited 0 and regenerated dist/orchestration.html with the engine inlined; no stdout/stderr output.
- git status was clean after commit.

Fixture lines added:
- None. Existing fixtures already covered the requested ledger and wave/state rules; tests were adapted to the actual sample export shape.

Suggested verifier checks:
- Re-run `node --test && node build.mjs` from this worktree and confirm both exit 0.
- Spot-check fixture-derived model expectations: smp-a1.4=ready, smp-c4=blocked by smp-c5, smp-a2.2 verification=fail, smp-c8 verification=pass, backlog wave contains only smp-c6.
- Inspect dist/orchestration.html and confirm engine exports were inlined without `export` keywords and without unresolved `{{...}}` placeholders.

Follow-up worth its own bead:
- If the panel needs richer string metadata from the engine return value itself rather than separate helper exports, that should be a separate API decision bead so bmc-4 can consume it explicitly.

Implemented `scripts/refresh.ps1`, `scripts/refresh.sh`, and shared `scripts/refresh-core.mjs` to generate `window.BMC_SNAPSHOT` from `.beads/issues.jsonl`, optionally attach `window.BMC_META` from `orchestration.meta.json`, and best-effort enrich `snapshot.orchestrator` from bd memories. PowerShell on this host required `-ExecutionPolicy Bypass`; with that, `powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File scripts/refresh.ps1 -Out "$env:TEMP\bmc-test1.js"` exited 0 and reported `Skipped 1 blank/corrupt JSONL lines`. `sh scripts/refresh.sh --out "$env:TEMP\bmc-test2.js"` also exited 0 and reported the same skip count. Node verification parsed both outputs, confirmed `generated_at` present, `issues.length === 11`, and equal issue counts. `node --test` passed 4/4, and `node build.mjs` exited 0.

Suggested verifier checks: exercise the `.git` output-path refusal path and a repo with intentionally corrupt JSONL lines. Follow-ups worth separate beads: make the corruption report more granular if needed, and decide whether the orchestration enrichment should be surfaced in the UI as a dedicated badge/section.
Completed in commit b8507b7; validation and contract notes recorded in closing comment.

Implemented native refresh generators in scripts/refresh.ps1 and scripts/refresh.sh, plus test/refresh.test.mjs gate. Validation run: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File scripts/refresh.ps1 -Out %TEMP%\bmc-test1.js => exit 0; sh scripts/refresh.sh --out /tmp/bmc-test2.js => exit 0; node --test => exit 0 (11 tests passed); node build.mjs => exit 0. Parsed snapshot outputs from both temp files: generated_at present and issues.length=11 for both. Suggested verifier checks: rerun the same script invocations on a clean checkout, confirm both outputs stay parseable and counts match, and confirm no runtime node invocation remains in the refresh scripts. Follow-ups worth separate beads: optionally harden multi-line bd memory escaping if those memories ever become multi-line, and optionally record executable-bit expectations for scripts/refresh.sh in repo conventions.

Implemented verification badges on done cards, unverified-only drift filter, and snapshot-driven orchestrator HUD with lock/handoff/attempt telemetry. Ran: node --test, node build.mjs, and powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File scripts/refresh.ps1. Observed: test/build exit 0; refresh completed with the expected telemetry-enrichment warning only. Verifier checks: helper tests cover age buckets, badge mapping, attempt extraction, and lock parsing; existing refresh/build/theme/panel tests stayed green. Follow-ups: independent visual QA should confirm live vs snapshot strip visibility and ATT chip/badge styling in-browser.

Implemented native install.ps1/install.sh wiring with config-preserving no-clobber behavior, traversal/reparse-point refusal, temp-file atomic writes, version-stamped JARVIS summary output, and node --test coverage for fresh install, config preservation, modified-panel refusal, update replacement, and traversal rejection. Verified with node --test test/install.test.mjs, node --test, and node build.mjs. Commit: 405158d.
Completed the GitHub Pages demo build-demo script, wrote config overrides, generated self-contained static panel, verified inert data loading in node VM, and confirmed relative references only.

Completed in commit 8cf206e. Added optional sibling script tags for orchestration.config.js and orchestration-data.js to src/panel.template.html immediately before the inline panel script so window.BMC_CONFIG and window.BMC_RUNTIME data are available at panel init. Removed the redundant script-tag injection step from scripts/build-demo.mjs to prevent duplicate tags in docs/index.html. Extended test/build.test.mjs to assert each tag appears exactly once in dist/orchestration.html and docs/index.html, and to verify the external tags precede the final inline panel script. Validation: node --test = pass, node build.mjs = pass, node scripts/build-demo.mjs = pass. Exact counts verified at 1 each for both tags in dist/orchestration.html and docs/index.html. No changes were made to src/engine.mjs, src/panel.js, scripts/refresh.*, or scripts/install.*.

Completed in commit 7a364be.

Implemented:
- Replaced the README stub with a full public README in English plus a short Italian section.
- Documented the two quickstart paths: raw single-file vendoring and install-script wiring.
- Documented the real runtime data chain: live fetch -> snapshot -> demo fallback, including the honest file:// story.
- Added a verified BMC_CONFIG reference table based on src/panel.js only: title, accent, dataPath, refreshInterval, strings, metaPath.
- Documented the real sibling-file wiring from bmc-11: the panel auto-loads orchestration.config.js and orchestration-data.js before init.
- Documented refresh/install script behavior from the actual scripts, including --no-bd-enrich / -NoBdEnrich and install preserve semantics for orchestration.config.js.
- Added docs/meta-json-overlay.md and docs/verification-ledger.md for the overlay and verification-ledger references linked by the README.
- Added test/readme.test.mjs to gate required headings and relative README paths, with docs/screenshot.png explicitly allow-listed as the QA placeholder.

Behavior verified against real code in this worktree:
- src/panel.js reads only title, accent, dataPath, refreshInterval, strings, metaPath from window.BMC_CONFIG.
- dist/src template load orchestration.config.js and orchestration-data.js as optional sibling scripts.
- Live mode fetches ../.beads/issues.jsonl by default over HTTP.
- Snapshot mode reads window.BMC_SNAPSHOT from orchestration-data.js when live fetch fails.
- Refresh scripts accept -BeadsDir/-Out/-NoBdEnrich and --beads-dir/--out/--no-bd-enrich.
- Install scripts accept -Target/-Dir/-Update/-Force and preserve an existing orchestration.config.js instead of overwriting it.

Validation run:
- node --test
- node build.mjs

Observed:
- node --test passed: 29 pass, 0 fail, 1 skipped (expected dangling-symlink test skip on this runner).
- node build.mjs exited 0.
- New README gate passed and all touched files stayed within scope: README.md, docs/*.md, test/readme.test.mjs.
